arts.ttl: Odegaard starts, Havertz and Rice overcome injury, Nwaneri call - Dream Arsenal XI vs Chelsea - Tom Canton - football.london
arts.sum: Dream Arsenal XI vs Chelsea: Raya, White, Saliba, Gabriel, Timber; Rice, Partey, Odegaard; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli Into midfield and while Arteta was unable to commit to Declan Rice’s availability after also failing to confirm whether he had indeed suffered a broken toe in this scenario the England international will aim to play through the pain as has been suggested.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names Man City's biggest problem in title race with Arsenal and Liverpool
arts.sum: According to Carragher, City's struggles this season have offered the likes of Liverpool and Arsenal a significant glimmer of hope in the title race. Pundit and ex- Liverpool defender Jamie Carragher has outlined Manchester City's biggest challenge in the title race with his former club and Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko 'reaches transfer agreement' as contract details emerge
arts.sum: The striker was consistently linked with a move to the Gunners as well as Chelsea during the summer transfer window but a deal never materialised for the 21-year-old who instead inked a one-year contract extension. The future of Sesko - who's scored seven goals in 14 games across all competitions this season - remains a huge talking point despite his contract not expiring until 2029.

arts.ttl: Leandro Trossard hits back at Arsenal criticism with Mikel Arteta claim
arts.sum: Trossard has remained one of the star players in Arteta's squad this season, but has scored just twice across his 14 appearances for the Gunners and will hope that will change during Sunday's clash against Chelsea in the Premier League . Arsenal go into Sunday's clash against Chelsea in the top flight in sixth place in the league standings and 10 points adrift of leaders Liverpool after their win over Aston Villa 24 hours earlier.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stars drop early Chelsea team news hint amid Declan Rice injury worry
arts.sum: Fellow midfielder Partey has also shared a graphic on his Instagram story, hinting that he could be involved in the lineup. Midfielder Declan Rice was forced to sit out the 1-0 loss against Inter on Wednesday night after picking up a knock during the loss by the scoreline against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Jesus starts, Odegaard returns amid Arteta formation change - Arsenal lineups vs Chelsea - Kaya Kaynak - football.london
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Cheslea: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Timber; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Havertz, Jesus Kaynak's Arsenal XI vs Chelsea - Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Timber; Partey, Odegaard, Rice; Saka, Havertz, Jesus

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko 'reaches gentleman's agreement' as Arsenal discover contract clause is gone
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko was heavily linked with a move to Arsenal during the summer transfer window, but the striker instead penned a one-year contract extension with RB Leipzig

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta calls up 14-year-old prodigy ahead of huge Chelsea fixture
arts.sum: With a mixture of first-team players in doubt for Mikel Arteta’s side's trip to Stamford Bridge, a new and fresh face featured in Arsenal training

arts.ttl: 'Saw straight away': Leandro Trossard admits he instantly knew £150k-a-week Chelsea star was a 'top player'
Arsenal and Chelsea target Osimhen CONFIRMS January ambition
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen has squashed rumours that he may leave Galatasaray in the January transfer window. I’ve seen a lot of the speculation linking me out of the club in January, I can state through me now I’m going to be here until the end of the season," he said.
